settings.heading: School Annual Day Awards Package
settings.subheading: Academic, cultural, sports and discipline awards for annual day in one co-ordinated, crest-branded order — trophies, medals and mementos with student names. Delivered before the event.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices; per-piece rates fall sharply at higher quantities. GST invoice included.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy bundles a school annual day awards package — academic, cultural, sports and discipline awards as trophies, medals and mementos with student names — branded with your crest, from around ₹150 a piece. Delivered before the day. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: One bundle for the whole event
settings.text: Annual day recognises achievement across academics, culture, sports and discipline — often dozens of awards with individual student names. We co-ordinate trophies, medals and mementos in one crest-branded order, each engraved with the student and category, delivered before the event.

settings.title: Every category covered
settings.text: Academic, cultural, sports and discipline awards.

settings.title: Student names engraved
settings.text: Individual recipient names on every award.

settings.title: School crest branding
settings.text: Crest and motto across the set.

settings.title: On-time delivery
settings.text: Planned dispatch ahead of annual day.

settings.title: Share your award list
settings.text: WhatsApp us your categories, quantities and event date.

settings.title: Pick designs & budget
settings.text: We send matching options and a single combined quote.

settings.title: Approve engraving proof
settings.text: Confirm names, logos and titles on a digital mockup.

settings.title: Delivered together
settings.text: Co-ordinated, boxed and shipped pan-India in time for your event.

settings.question: Can each award carry the student's name?
settings.answer: Yes — send a sheet by category and we engrave each piece individually, labelled for the stage.

settings.question: Can you brand with our crest and motto?
settings.answer: Yes — crest and motto across trophies, medals and mementos.

settings.question: Will it arrive before annual day?
settings.answer: Yes — order 2–3 weeks ahead; we plan dispatch to your date.

settings.question: Do you provide a GST invoice?
settings.answer: Yes — one GST invoice, with documentation for school accounts.

settings.heading: Planning a school annual day?
settings.text: Send your award list and date — we'll design a matching combo and quote, usually within the hour.
